title: assembly
description:
Articulated-asset intermediate representation. Written by initialize_placement.py for iteration 001, then updated by update_placement.py. Consumed by blender_assemble.py and blender_export_usd.py.

Each part stores world-space metric values plus pre-computed Blender transforms. initialize_placement.py and update_placement.py derive node_scale and node_origin from component_dims.json:
  parent_world_scale   = world_size[parent] / raw_size[parent]   (accumulated; [1,1,1] for root)
  node_scale[axis]     = world_size[axis] / (parent_world_scale[axis] × raw_size[axis])
  node_origin[axis]    = world_center[axis] / parent_world_scale[axis]
                         − (R(euler_deg) × (node_scale × raw_center))[axis]

blender_assemble.py applies node_scale, node_origin, and euler_deg directly. Children must appear after their parent in the parts array.

root.description: Base directory for resolving relative mesh paths (the run directory).

robot_name.description: Name of the assembled object; used as the URDF <robot name>.

name.description: Short, unique snake_case part name used as the image/GLB file stem.

description.description: One sentence identifying WHAT the part is and WHERE it sits. Used as the image-generation prompt.

parent.description: Name of the parent part; null for the root. Children must appear after their parent in the parts array.

visual_mesh.description: GLB path (relative to root or absolute) used for high-quality Blender renders. Use component_glbs/<name>.glb.

collision_mesh.description: Collision mesh path (relative to root or absolute). Use the same GLB as visual_mesh: component_glbs/<name>.glb.

world_size.description: World bounding-box dimensions [W, D, H] in metres.

world_center.description: World-space centre [x, y, z] in metres. Root typically sits on the floor at [0, 0, height/2].

euler_deg.description: XYZ Euler rotation in degrees [roll, pitch, yaw] applied at the part's Blender node.

node_scale.description: Per-axis stretch factors on the Blender empty parent. Pre-computed by initialize_placement.py / update_placement.py.

node_origin.description: Local [x, y, z] offset on the parent empty. Pre-computed by initialize_placement.py / update_placement.py.
